title: November 16, 2015 – Raye Zaragoza
summary: Pima/Mexican/Taiwanese singer-songwriter Raye Zaragoza, born and raised in Manhattan, NY, shares a unique brand of folk pop with her debut EP, “Heroine”. The album explores themes of love and taking life by the reins, carrying influences from Jewel to Led Zeppelin. As a child, her father would liste...
